  try {
    if (window.__mintlifyInitialSidebarScrollDone) return;
    window.__mintlifyInitialSidebarScrollDone = true;

    var path = (window.location.pathname || '/').split('#')[0].split('?')[0];
    if (path.endsWith('/index')) path = path.slice(0, -6);
    else if (path === 'index') path = '';

    var candidates = [];
    if (path) candidates.push(path);
    if (path.startsWith('/')) candidates.push(path.slice(1));
    else candidates.push('/' + path);

    var item = null;
    for (var i = 0; i < candidates.length && !item; i++) {
      var matches = document.querySelectorAll('[id="' + candidates[i].replace(/"/g, '\\"') + '"]');
      for (var j = 0; j < matches.length; j++) {
        if (matches[j].closest('#sidebar, #sidebar-content')) {
          item = matches[j];
          break;
        }
      }
    }
    if (!item) return;

    var parent = item.parentElement;
    while (parent) {
      var style = getComputedStyle(parent);
      if (style.overflowY === 'auto' || style.overflowY === 'scroll') break;
      parent = parent.parentElement;
    }
    if (!parent) return;

    var parentRect = parent.getBoundingClientRect();
    var itemRect = item.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (itemRect.top >= parentRect.top && itemRect.bottom <= parentRect.bottom) return;

    var itemTopRelative = itemRect.top - parentRect.top + parent.scrollTop;
    parent.scrollTop = itemTopRelative - parentRect.height / 2 + itemRect.height / 2;
  } catch (e) {}
})();</script></div></div></div></div></nav><script data-page-href="/trading/wallets-auth" id="content"><span data-as="p">Start by identifying the account’s wallet type. You can then connect an existing Polymarket account or create new accounts for your users.</span>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="wallet-types"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#wallet-types" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Wallet Types</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">A Deposit Wallet is the default smart wallet for trading on Polymarket. Your wallet type depends on how and when the account wallet was created.</span>
<!-- --><div role="presentation" style="position:relative;--scroll-area-corner-height:0px;--scroll-area-corner-width:0px" data-component-part="scroll-area" data-table-wrapper="true" class="min-w-0 [--page-padding:20px] flex w-[calc(100%+(var(--page-padding)*2))] my-[1em] py-[1em] -mx-(--page-padding) max-w-none [contain:inline-size]"><div role="region" data-id="base-ui-_R_3lcrrav5tccsmisnpfiulb_-viewport" tabindex="-1" class="size-full rounded-[inherit] overflow-y-hidden! base-ui-disable-scrollbar" style="overflow:scroll" data-component-part="scroll-area-viewport" aria-label="Scrollable table"><div role="presentation" style="min-width:fit-content" data-component-part="scroll-area-content" class="flex"><div class="px-(--page-padding) grow max-w-none table"><table class="m-0 min-w-full w-full max-w-none table [&amp;_td]:min-w-[150px] [&amp;_th]:text-left [&amp;_td[data-numeric]]:tabular-nums"><thead><tr><th>Wallet type</th><th>When it applies</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><strong>Deposit Wallet</strong></td><td>All Polymarket account wallets deployed on or after May 4, 2026 use it.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Proxy Wallet</strong></td><td>A legacy smart wallet created through Magic Link or Google authentication on polymarket.com.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Safe Wallet</strong></td><td>A legacy smart wallet created with an external signer such as MetaMask or Rabby Wallet.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div></div>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="connect-your-account"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#connect-your-account" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Connect Your Account</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">Connect an existing polymarket.com account to trade with its funds and positions. Copy the account wallet address from the profile menu:</span>

<span data-as="p">Create a Relayer API key under polymarket.com → Settings → API Keys → Relayer API Keys:</span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">  }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">}</span></span>

<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="create-new-accounts"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#create-new-accounts" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Create New Accounts</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">Create a polymarket.com account to serve as your builder account. It represents your integration and owns the builder profile and API credentials used to create Deposit Wallets for your users. Each wallet remains controlled by its signer.</span>
<span data-as="p">In the builder account, open polymarket.com → Settings → Builders and create an API key:</span>
<div><div data-name="frame" class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"><div style="background-position:10px 10px" <span class="line"><span>request_path = &quot;/submit&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>

wait for the action to settle. The same methods are available on the
synchronous <code>SecureClient</code>.</span><span data-as="p">Create an <code>AsyncSecureClient</code> with either a Relayer or Builder API key:</span><div dir="ltr" data-orientation="horizontal" <h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="set-up-trading-approvals"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#set-up-trading-approvals" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Set Up Trading Approvals</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">Set up the ERC-20 and ERC-1155 approvals that allow Polymarket’s exchange
contracts to spend the account wallet’s pUSD and Conditional Tokens when
placing orders. For Deposit Wallets, Safe Wallets, and Proxy Wallets, these
approvals are submitted as a gasless transaction.</span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_ADDRESS: &lt;signer_address&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_SIGNATURE: &lt;clob_l2_signature&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_TIMESTAMP: &lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_API_KEY: &lt;clob_api_key&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  -H</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;POLY_PASSPHRASE: &lt;clob_api_passphrase&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  --data-urlencode</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;asset_type=CONDITIONAL&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  --data-urlencode</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;token_id=&lt;token_id&gt;&quot;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  --data-urlencode</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;signature_type=3&quot;</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div></div></div><div class="print:hidden" data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div></div></div><span data-as="p">Using the signer address and CLOB API credentials from <a class="link" href="/getting-started/api#authentication">API
Authentication</a>, create a fresh
<code>&lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt;</code> and generate <code>&lt;clob_l2_signature&gt;</code> without a request
body. The query parameters are not part of the signed path:</span><div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E;color:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4" language="text"><code language="text" numberOfLines="6"><span class="line"><span>message = &lt;clob_request_timestamp&gt; + &quot;GET&quot; + &quot;/balance-allowance/update&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>clob_l2_signature = urlsafeBase64WithPadding(</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>  HMAC-SHA256(base64Decode(&lt;clob_api_secret&gt;), message)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span></code></pre></div></div></div></div><div class="print:hidden" data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div><span data-as="p">Refresh the conditional-token allowance for each token before its first sell order.</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div>
<hr/>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="advanced-options"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#advanced-options" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Advanced Options</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">Explore additional wallet and authentication patterns for advanced integrations.</span>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="derive-a-deposit-wallet-address"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#derive-a-deposit-wallet-address" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Derive a Deposit Wallet Address</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">If you need to compute a Deposit Wallet address before deployment, use the
deterministic derivation algorithm below.</span>
<div role="note" aria-label="Note" class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20" data-callout-type="note"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300"><path d="M 9 1.6714 C 13.0371 1.6714 16.3286 4.9629 16.3286 9 C 16.3286 13.0371 13.0371 16.3286 9 16.3286 C 7.0574 16.3252 5.1953 15.552 3.8217 14.1783 C 2.448 12.8047 1.6748 10.9426 1.6714 9 C 1.6714 4.9629 4.9629 1.6714 9 1.6714 Z M 9 0 C 4.0371 0 0 4.0371 0 9 C 0 13.9629 4.0371 18 9 18 C 13.9629 18 18 13.9629 18 9 C 18 4.0371 13.9629 0 9 0 Z M 10.2857 3.8571 H 7.7143 V 10.2857 H 10.2857 V 3.8571 Z M 10.2857 11.5714 H 7.7143 V 14.1429 H 10.2857 V 11.5714 Z" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:text-current! [&amp;_kbd]:text-current! [&amp;_a]:text-current! [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:text-current! text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p">Deposit Wallets deployed before the June 29, 2026 upgrade use a UUPS proxy.
Deposit Wallets deployed after the upgrade use a beacon proxy. The following
algorithm derives the address for a new Deposit Wallet with a beacon proxy.</span></div></div>
<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent" numberOfLines="10" language="text"><div data-floating-buttons="true" class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5 print:hidden"><div class="z-10 select-none" data-state="closed"><button class="size-6.5 flex items-center justify-center rounded-md group/copy-button in-data-floating-buttons:group-[:not(:has([data-fade-overlay]))]:bg-gray-100 dark:in-data-floating-buttons:group-[:not(:has([data-fade-overlay]))]:bg-gray-800" data-testid="copy-code-button" aria-label="Copy the contents from the code block"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60"><path d="M14.25 5.25H7.25C6.14543 5.25 5.25 6.14543 5.25 7.25V14.25C5.25 15.3546 6.14543 16.25 7.25 16.25H14.25C15.3546 16.25 16.25 15.3546 16.25 14.25V7.25C16.25 6.14543 15.3546 5.25 14.25 5.25Z" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M2.80103 11.998L1.77203 5.07397C1.61003 3.98097 2.36403 2.96397 style="position:relative;--scroll-area-corner-height:0px;--scroll-area-corner-width:0px;font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E" data-component-part="code-block-root" class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full h-full dark:bg-codeblock text-sm leading-6 transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background **:ring-0 **:outline-0 **:focus:ring-0 **:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white"><div role="presentation" data-id="base-ui-_R_cvlcrrav5tccsmisnpfiulb_-viewport" tabindex="-1" class="size-full rounded-[inherit] py-3.5 px-4 overflow-y-hidden! base-ui-disable-scrollbar" style="overflow:scroll" data-component-part="scroll-area-viewport"><div role="presentation" style="min-width:fit-content" data-component-part="scroll-area-content" class="min-w-full! h-full children:my-0! children:shadow-none! children:bg-transparent!"><div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E;color:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4" language="text"><code language="text" numberOfLines="10"><span class="line"><span>factory = 0x00000000000Fb5C9ADea0298D729A0CB3823Cc07</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>beacon  = 0x7A18EDfe055488A3128f01F563e5B479D92ffc3a</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>walletId = bytes32(signer)                  // left-pad the signer to 32 bytes</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>args     = abi.encode(factory, walletId)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>salt     = keccak256(args)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span>
<span class="line"><span>beaconInitCodeHash = SoladyLibClone.initCodeHashERC1967BeaconProxy(beacon, args)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span>depositWallet      = CREATE2(factory, salt, beaconInitCodeHash)</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span></code></pre></div></div></div></div><div class="print:hidden" data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>
<span data-as="p">See <a class="link" href="/resources/contracts#wallet-factory-contracts">Contract Addresses</a> for the
current Deposit Wallet factory and beacon.</span>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="set-up-eoa-trading"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#set-up-eoa-trading" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Set Up EOA Trading</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">If your EOA is allowlisted for trading, use it as the account wallet. Every
onchain action—including token approvals, ERC-20 transfers, splits, merges, and
redemptions—is submitted directly from the EOA and requires POL for gas.</span>
<div class="tabs tabs tab-container"><ul role="tablist" class="not-prose mb-6 pb-[1px] flex-none min-w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 gap-x-6 flex dark:border-gray-200/10" data-component-part="tabs-list"><li id="typescript-5" role="tab" aria-selected="true" aria-controls="panel-typescript-5-0" tabindex="0" class="cursor-pointer"><div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-primary dark:text-primary-light border-current" data-component-part="tab-button" data-active="true" data-testid="tab-TypeScript"> <!-- -->TypeScript</div></li><li id="python-5" role="tab" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="panel-python-5-1" tabindex="-1" class="cursor-pointer"><div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-gray-900 border-transparent hover:border-gray-300 dark:text-gray-200 dark:hover:border-gray-700" data-component-part="tab-button" data-active="false" data-testid="tab-Python"> <!-- -->Python</div></li><li id="api-5" role="tab" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="panel-api-5-2" tabindex="-1" class="cursor-pointer"><div class="flex text-sm items-center gap-1.5 leading-6 font-semibold whitespace-nowrap pt-3 pb-2.5 -mb-px max-w-max border-b text-gray-900 border-transparent hover:border-gray-300 dark:text-gray-200 dark:hover:border-gray-700" data-component-part="tab-button" data-active="false" data-testid="tab-API"> <!-- -->API</div></li></ul><div><div id="panel-typescript-5-0" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="typescript-5" tabindex="0" class="prose dark:prose-invert overflow-x-auto [&amp;_[data-table-wrapper]]:![--page-padding:0px] [&amp;_[role=&quot;listitem&quot;]]:pl-4 [&amp;&gt;:first-child:not(p)]:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;:first-child:not(p)_img]:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;:first-child[data-table-wrapper]]:pt-0!" data-component-part="tab-content"><span data-as="p">Pass the signer address as <code>wallet</code>. The SDK identifies the account as an
EOA and skips Deposit Wallet deployment.</span><div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group min-w-0 print:print-color-exact text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light <span data-as="p">Remote Builder Signing keeps Builder API credentials on your server while a TypeScript client requests signed headers for Builder-authenticated actions.</span>

<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="opt-out-of-beacon-upgrades"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#opt-out-of-beacon-upgrades" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="size-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-xs text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="size-3 shrink-0"><path d="M8.50001 6.827C8.14801 6.995 7.81801 7.225 7.52701 7.517L7.51701 7.527C6.13601 8.908 6.13601 11.146 7.51701 12.527L9.69201 14.702C11.073 16.083 13.311 16.083 14.692 14.702L14.702 14.692C16.083 13.311 16.083 11.073 14.702 9.692L13.771 8.761" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path><path d="M9.50002 11.173C9.85202 11.005 10.182 10.775 10.473 10.483L10.483 10.473C11.864 9.092 11.864 6.854 10.483 5.473L8.30802 3.298C6.92702 1.917 4.68902 1.917 3.30802 3.298L3.29802 3.308C1.91702 4.689 1.91702 6.927 3.29802 8.308L4.22902 9.239" stroke="currentColor" width="1.5" linecap="round" linejoin="round"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Opt Out of Beacon Upgrades</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Deposit Wallets deployed after June 29, 2026 use an <a href="https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-1967#beacon-contract-address" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="link">ERC-1967 beacon
proxy</a>. This
proxy pattern resolves the implementation for multiple wallets through a shared
beacon, allowing Polymarket to send implementation upgrades without changing
their addresses. The wallet owner can instead pin the wallet to the
implementation that is current when it opts out. The owner-only calls below are
submitted directly and require POL for gas.</span>
<div role="note" aria-label="Warning" class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 dark:border-yellow-900 dark:bg-yellow-600/20 [&amp;_[data-component-part=&#x27;callout-icon&#x27;]]:mt-px" data-callout-type="warning"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true" class="flex-none size-5 text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300"><path d="M 9 6.75 v 1.5 m 0 3 h 0.0075 m -5.2035 3 h 10.392 c 1.155 0 1.8765 -1.2503 1.299 -2.25 L 10.299 3 c -0.5775 -0.9997 -2.0205 -0.9997 -2.598 0 L 2.505 12 c -0.5775 0.9997 0.144 2.25 1.299 2.25 z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:text-current! [&amp;_kbd]:text-current! [&amp;_a]:text-current! [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:text-current! text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p">An opted-out wallet does not receive future security fixes, bug fixes, or
features delivered through beacon upgrades. Review the current implementation
and accept responsibility for maintaining the wallet before opting out.</span></div></div>
<div role="list" class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6"><div role="listitem" class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"><div data-component-part="step-line" class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-11 bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10" contentEditable="false"></div><div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" data-component-part="step-number" contentEditable="false"><div class="group/step-indicator relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center"><div class="group-has-[a:focus-visible]/step-indicator:opacity-0">1</div></div></div><div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px"><p class="mt-2 font-semibold prose dark:prose-invert text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-200" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="step-title">Pause the Wallet</p><div data-component-part="step-content" class="prose dark:prose-invert"><span data-as="p">Send a direct onchain transaction from the wallet owner to call <code>pause()</code> on
the Deposit Wallet.</span></div></div></div><div role="listitem" class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"><div data-component-part="step-line" class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-11 bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10" contentEditable="false"></div><div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" data-component-part="step-number" contentEditable="false"><div class="group/step-indicator relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center"><div class="group-has-[a:focus-visible]/step-indicator:opacity-0">2</div></div></div><div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px"><p class="mt-2 font-semibold prose dark:prose-invert text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-200" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="step-title">Wait for the Timelock</p><div data-component-part="step-content" class="prose dark:prose-invert"><span data-as="p">Read <code>timelockDelay()</code> from the Deposit Wallet factory and wait until that
interval has elapsed after the wallet was paused.</span></div></div></div><div role="listitem" class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"><div data-component-part="step-line" class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-11 bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10" contentEditable="false"></div><div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" data-component-part="step-number" contentEditable="false"><div class="group/step-indicator relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center"><div class="group-has-[a:focus-visible]/step-indicator:opacity-0">3</div></div></div><div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px"><p class="mt-2 font-semibold prose dark:prose-invert text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-200" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="step-title">Opt Out</p><div data-component-part="step-content" class="prose dark:prose-invert"><span data-as="p">Send another transaction from the wallet owner to call <code>optOut()</code> on the
Deposit Wallet. This pins the wallet to the beacon implementation that is
current when the transaction executes.</span></div></div></div><div role="listitem" class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"><div data-component-part="step-line" class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-11 bg-transparent bg-linear-to-b from-gray-200 dark:from-white/10 via-80% to-transparent group-has-[[data-component-part=&quot;step-content&quot;]:empty]/step:hidden" contentEditable="false"></div><div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" data-component-part="step-number" contentEditable="false"><div class="group/step-indicator relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center"><div class="group-has-[a:focus-visible]/step-indicator:opacity-0">4</div></div></div><div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px"><p class="mt-2 font-semibold prose dark:prose-invert text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-200" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="step-title">Unpause the Wallet</p><div data-component-part="step-content" class="prose dark:prose-invert"><span data-as="p">Call <code>unpause()</code> from the wallet owner to clear the paused state.</span></div></div></div></div>
<span data-as="p">To resume receiving beacon upgrades, repeat the pause and timelock steps, call
<code>optIn()</code>, and then unpause the wallet. Review the beacon’s current default
implementation before opting back in.</span></div><div class="feedback-toolbar pb-16 w-full flex flex-col gap-y-8"><div class="flex flex-row flex-wrap gap-4 items-center justify-between"><p class="inline-block text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 whitespace-nowrap">Was this page helpful?</p><div class="flex flex-wrap grow gap-3 items-center justify-end"><div class="flex gap-3 items-center"><button id="feedback-thumbs-up" class="px-3.5 py-2 flex flex-row gap-3 items-center border-standard rounded-xl text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-700 /tick-size\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/market-data/get-tick-size\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get tick size by path parameter\",\"description\":\"Retrieves the minimum tick size Returns paginated results.\\nBuilder-authenticated clients can also use this endpoint to retrieve orders attributed to their builder account.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /data/orders\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/get-user-orders\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Cancel multiple orders\",\"description\":\"Cancels multiple orders by their IDs. Maximum 1000 orders per request.\\nDuplicate order IDs in the request are automatically ignored.\\nWorks even in cancel-only mode.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml delete /orders\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/cancel-multiple-orders\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Cancel all orders\",\"description\":\"Cancels all open orders for the authenticated user. Works even in cancel-only mode.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml delete /cancel-all\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/cancel-all-orders\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Cancel orders for a market\",\"description\":\"Cancels all open orders for the authenticated user in a specific market (condition) and asset.\\nWorks even in cancel-only mode.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml delete /cancel-market-orders\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/cancel-orders-for-a-market\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get order scoring status\",\"description\":\"Checks if a specific order is currently scoring for rewards.\\n\\nAn order is considered \\\"scoring\\\" if it meets all the criteria for earning maker rewards:\\n- The order is live on a rewards-eligible market\\n- The order meets the minimum size requirements\\n- The order is within the valid spread range\\n- The order has been live for the required duration\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /order-scoring\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/get-order-scoring-status\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Send heartbeat\",\"description\":\"Sends a heartbeat signal to maintain active session status.\\nIf heartbeats are not sent regularly, all open orders for the user will be automatically canceled.\\nThis is useful for automated trading systems that need to ensure orders are canceled\\nif the system becomes unresponsive.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml post /heartbeats\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/send-heartbeat\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true}]},{\"group\":\"Trades\",\"pages\":[{\"title\":\"Get trades\",\"description\":\"Retrieves trades for the authenticated user. Returns paginated results.\\nRequires readonly or level 2 API key authentication.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /data/trades\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/get-trades\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get builder trades\",\"description\":\"Retrieves trades attributed to a builder code.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /builder/trades\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/trade/get-builder-trades\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true}]},{\"group\":\"Rebates\",\"pages\":[{\"title\":\"Get current rebated fees for a maker\",\"description\":\"Returns the current rebated fees for a maker address on a given date.\\n\\nEach entry includes the condition ID, asset address, and the USDC amount rebated.\\n\\nThis endpoint does not require authentication.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rebates/current\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rebates/get-current-rebated-fees-for-a-maker\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true}]},{\"group\":\"Rewards\",\"pages\":[{\"title\":\"Get current active rewards configurations\",\"description\":\"Returns all current active rewards configurations grouped by market.\\n\\nWhen `sponsored=true`, returns sponsored reward configurations instead.\\n\\nResults are paginated (500 items per page). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/markets/current\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-current-active-rewards-configurations\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get raw rewards for a specific market\",\"description\":\"Returns an array of present and future rewards configured on a market.\\n\\nWhen `sponsored=true`, sponsored daily rates are folded into each config's\\n`rate_per_day` .\\n\\nResults are paginated (100 items per page). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/markets/{condition_id}\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-raw-rewards-for-a-specific-market\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get multiple markets with rewards\",\"description\":\"Returns a list of active markets with their reward configurations.\\nSupports text search, tag filtering, numeric filters, and sorting.\\n\\nResults are paginated (100 items per page by default). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/markets/multi\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-multiple-markets-with-rewards\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get earnings for user by date\",\"description\":\"Returns an array of user earnings per market for a provided day.\\n\\nRequires CLOB L2 Auth headers.\\n\\nResults are paginated (100 items per page). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/user\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-earnings-for-user-by-date\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get total earnings for user by date\",\"description\":\"Returns the summed total rewards earnings for a user on a provided day,\\ngrouped by asset address.\\n\\nRequires CLOB L2 Auth headers.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/user/total\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-total-earnings-for-user-by-date\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get reward percentages for user\",\"description\":\"Returns the real-time percentages of rewards that a user is earning per market.\\n\\nThe response is a map of condition_id to the percentage of total rewards\\nthe user is currently earning in that market.\\n\\nRequires CLOB L2 Auth headers.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get /rewards/user/percentages\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/rewards/get-reward-percentages-for-user\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get user earnings and markets configuration\",\"description\":\"Returns an array of current rewards including user earnings and live percentages\\nper market for a provided day.\\n\\nResults are paginated (100 items per page by default, max 500). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages.\\nA next_cursor value of \\\"LTE=\\\" indicates the last page.\\n\\nRequires CLOB L2 Auth headers.\\n\\nOptional features:\\n- Search by question/description using the `q` parameter\\n- Filter by tag slugs using `tag_slug` parameter (multiple values are OR'ed)\\n- Filter by favorite markets using `favorite_markets=true`\\n- Sort by various fields using `order_by` and `position` parameters\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/clob-openapi.yaml get request to the Relayer. Authenticated using Builder API Keys or Relayer API Keys.\\n\\nReturns immediately with the `transactionID` and a `state` of `STATE_NEW`. The onchain transaction hash is **not** included in this response — poll `GET /transaction` with the returned `transactionID` to retrieve the `transactionHash` once the transaction has been broadcast.\\n\\n**Builder API Key auth headers:**\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_API_KEY`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_TIMESTAMP`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_PASSPHRASE`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_SIGNATURE`\\n\\n**Relayer API Key auth headers:**\\n- `RELAYER_API_KEY`\\n- `RELAYER_API_KEY_ADDRESS`\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml post /submit\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/submit-a-transaction\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get a transaction by ID\",\"description\":\"Gets a transaction submitted to the Relayer. Takes in a required transaction ID as a query parameter.\\n\\nPoll this endpoint with the `transactionID` returned from `POST /submit` to retrieve the onchain `transactionHash` once the transaction has been broadcast.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /transaction\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/get-a-transaction-by-id\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get recent transactions for a user\",\"description\":\"Gets the most recent transactions submitted to the Relayer, owned by a specific user. Authenticated using Builder API Keys or Relayer API Keys.\\n\\n**Builder API Key auth headers:**\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_API_KEY`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_TIMESTAMP`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_PASSPHRASE`\\n- `POLY_BUILDER_SIGNATURE`\\n\\n**Relayer API Key auth headers:**\\n- `RELAYER_API_KEY`\\n- `RELAYER_API_KEY_ADDRESS`\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /transactions\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/get-recent-transactions-for-a-user\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get current nonce for a user\",\"description\":\"Gets the current Proxy or Safe nonce for a user. Takes in the user's signer address and the type of nonce to retrieve.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /nonce\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/get-current-nonce-for-a-user\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get relayer address and nonce\",\"description\":\"Fetches the relayer address and nonce for a specific user. Takes in the user's signer address and the type of nonce to retrieve.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /relay-payload\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/get-relayer-address-and-nonce\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Check if a wallet is deployed\",\"description\":\"Returns whether the wallet at the given address is deployed onchain.\\n\\nUse the `type` query parameter to choose which wallet type to check:\\n\\n- Pass user's Polymarket `SAFE` address (default): Gnosis Safe (SignatureType `2`).\\n- Pass user's Polymarket `WALLET` Deposit Wallet address: Deposit Wallet (signatureType `3`). See the [Deposit Wallet Guide](/trading/deposit-wallets) for setup.\\n\\nOmitting `type` is equivalent to `type=SAFE`.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /deployed\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer/check-if-a-wallet-is-deployed\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get all relayer API keys\",\"description\":\"Returns all relayer API keys for the authenticated address. Auth allowed: Gamma auth or Relayer API key auth (`RELAYER_API_KEY` + `RELAYER_API_KEY_ADDRESS`).\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/relayer-openapi.yaml get /relayer/api/keys\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/relayer-api-keys/get-all-relayer-api-keys\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true}]},{\"group\":\"Combos\",\"tag\":\"New\",\"pages\":[{\"title\":\"Get combo markets\",\"description\":\"Returns active markets that can be used as combo legs, ordered by volume\\ndescending. This endpoint is public and does not require CLOB\\nauthentication.\\n\\nEntries in `position_ids`, `outcomes`, and `outcome_prices` correspond by\\narray index (`[0]` is YES, `[1]` is NO). Use `next_cursor` unchanged in\\nthe next request; a value of `null` indicates the final page.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/combos-rfq-openapi.yaml get /v1/rfq/combo-markets\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/combo-markets/get-combo-markets\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Submit a quote\",\"description\":\"Submit a signed maker quote for an active RFQ. Requires CLOB L2\\nauthentication for the maker role.\\n\\nREST does not assign a quote ID — generate `quote_id` client-side.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/combos-rfq-openapi.yaml post /v1/maker/quotes\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/maker/submit-a-quote\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Cancel a quote\",\"description\":\"Cancel an active maker quote before it is selected. Requires CLOB L2\\nauthentication for the maker role. `signer_address` and `maker_address`\\nmust match the authenticated identity.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/combos-rfq-openapi.yaml post /v1/maker/quotes/cancel\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/maker/cancel-a-quote\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Confirm or decline last look\",\"description\":\"Respond to a last-look confirmation request for a selected quote. Requires\\nCLOB L2 authentication for the maker role. `decision` must be `CONFIRM` or\\n`DECLINE`.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/combos-rfq-openapi.yaml post /v1/maker/confirmations\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/maker/confirm-or-decline-last-look\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get user combo positions\",\"description\":\"Combinatorial (multi-market) positions held by a user, with per-leg breakdown. Also available at /v1/data/user/{address}/positions/combos (address from the path). Open positions with shares_balance below 0.001 are omitted (dust floor — e.g. sub-0.001 remainders left by \\\"sell all\\\" cashouts); resolved positions are served regardless of balance.\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/data-openapi.yaml get /v1/positions/combos\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/core/get-user-combo-positions\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get user combo activity\",\"description\":\"Combo lifecycle and redeem events (split / merge / convert / compress / wrap / unwrap / redeem) for a user, with per-leg breakdown. Posting a new auto-cancel replaces the\\nprevious one.\\n\\nThe switch is one-shot: once the deadline elapses and your open orders are\\ncancelled, the schedule clears automatically. Orders you place after the\\nfire are not affected by the expired deadline — re-arm to extend\\nprotection.\\n\\nEach account may trigger auto-cancel at most 10 times per UTC day. Once\\nthat limit is reached, further attempts to arm a schedule are rejected with\\n`auto_cancel_daily_limit_reached` until the next UTC day; clearing an\\nexisting schedule (`time: 0`) is always allowed.\\n\\nUse `GET /v1/account/auto-cancel` to check the current deadline, today's\\ntrigger count, and when the daily counter resets.\\n\\nRequires proxy signature, see [proxy signing](/http/signing#2-proxy-signing).\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json patch /v1/trade/auto-cancel\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/set-auto-cancel\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Update Leverage\",\"description\":\"Update leverage for an instrument.\\nRequires proxy signature, see [proxy signing](/http/signing#2-proxy-signing).\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json patch /v1/trade/leverage\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/update-leverage\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Create Proxy\",\"description\":\"Create a new proxy to sign orders. Returns an API secret for private account access.\\nRequires EOA signature, see [EOA signing](/http/signing#1-eoa-signing).\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json post /v1/account/proxy\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/create-proxy\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Delete Proxy\",\"description\":\"Delete a proxy by address.\\nRequires EOA signature, see [EOA signing](/http/signing#1-eoa-signing).\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json delete /v1/account/proxy\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/delete-proxy\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Credentials\",\"description\":\"Get the account ID, address, and proxy keys for the authenticated account.\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/credentials\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-credentials\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Orders\",\"description\":\"Get historical order snapshots for the authenticated account from the order history database.\\nReturns the latest known state for each matching order, including accepted, open, partial,\\nfilled, and cancelled orders. signature, see [EOA signing](/http/signing#1-eoa-signing).\\n\\nThe `amount` field is the raw token amount including decimals (e.g. `\\\"100000000\\\"` for 100 USDC).\\nThis must match the `uint256 amount` value used in the EIP-712 `Withdraw` signature.\\n\\nThe `ts` field is Unix seconds (not milliseconds) because the on-chain contract validates it\\nagainst `block.timestamp`. It must also match the `uint64 ts` in the signed EIP-712 struct.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json post live\\nopen-order count; the rate-usage counters (`actions_per_minute`,\\n`actions_burst`, and `reset`) are not tracked here and are reported as 0.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/limits\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-account-limits\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Account Rewards\",\"description\":\"Get per-instrument daily liquidity reward shares for the authenticated account.\\nReward periods run from 12:00 UTC to 12:00 UTC and are labeled by their UTC end date.\\nOI rewards pay 6% APR on the account's full daily average gross OI across all\\ninstruments when the combined daily average gross OI of its rewards entity is\\nat least $1M. Accounts without an entity mapping qualify independently.\\nThe first reward period starts at 2026-05-08 12:00 UTC. If no date range is provided,\\nthe latest computed reward period is returned.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/rewards\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-account-rewards\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Instrument Config\",\"description\":\"Get per-instrument configuration (leverage and margin mode) for the authenticated account.\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/config\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-instrument-config\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Get Auto-Cancel Status\",\"description\":\"Get the current auto-cancel dead-man-switch status for the authenticated\\naccount, including the armed deadline, today's trigger count, and when\\nthe daily counter resets.\\n\",\"deprecated\":null,\"version\":null,\"openapi\":\"/api-spec/perps-openapi.json get /v1/account/auto-cancel\",\"href\":\"/api-reference/get-auto-cancel-status\",\"autogeneratedByOpenApi\":true},{\"title\":\"Create Account Invite\",\"description\":\"Create or return the authenticated account's primary invite code. = 250;\n  const TAB_SELECTOR = '[role=\"tab\"]';\n  const TABS_CONTAINER_SELECTOR =\n    'tabs, .tabs, [data-component-part=\"tabs-list\"]';\n\n  let activeAnchor = null;\n  let frameId = null;\n\n  const track = () =\u003e {\n    if (!activeAnchor) {\n      frameId = null;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const { element, top, until } = activeAnchor;\n\n    if (!document.contains(element)) {\n      activeAnchor = null;\n      frameId = null;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const nextTop = element.getBoundingClientRect().top;\n    const delta = nextTop - top;\n\n    if (delta !== 0) {\n      window.scrollTo({\n        top: window.scrollY + delta,\n        left: window.scrollX,\n        behavior: \"auto\",\n      });\n    }\n\n    if (performance.now() \u003c until) {\n      frameId = requestAnimationFrame(track);\n    } else {\n      activeAnchor = null;\n      frameId = null;\n    }\n  };\n\n  const startTracking = (tab) =\u003e {\n    activeAnchor = {\n      element: tab,\n      top: tab.getBoundingClientRect().top,\n      until: performance.now() + TRACK_MS,\n    };\n\n    if (frameId === null) {\n      frameId = requestAnimationFrame(track);\n    }\n  };\n\n  document.addEventListener(\n    \"click\",\n    (event) =\u003e {\n      const tab = event.target.closest(TAB_SELECTOR);\n\n      if (!tab || !tab.closest(TABS_CONTAINER_SELECTOR)) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      startTracking(tab);\n    },\n    true,\n  );\n\n  document.addEventListener(\n    \"keydown\",\n    (event) =\u003e {\n      if (event.key !== \"Enter\" \u0026\u0026 event.key !== \" \") {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const tab = event.target.closest(TAB_SELECTOR);\n\n      if (!tab || !tab.closest(TABS_CONTAINER_SELECTOR)) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n );\n})();\n"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"5f:[\"$\",\"$L64\",null,{\"customJsDisabled\":false,\"jsFiles\":[{\"_id\":\"6a286fbe0ccbcdb3132fb965\",\"subdomain\":\"polymarket-292d1b1b\",\"filePath\":\"stable-tabs-scroll.js\",\"__v\":0,\"content\":\"$65\"}]}]\n68:Ta9720,"])</script><script>self.__next_f.push([1,"\"use
